raw_prompt:
The Boss changes the request materially four times in one session: after
contract 1 is presented, then again after contract 2, then again after
contract 3, then again after contract 4 - each time adding or removing a
domain.
raw_response: After the 3rd re-contract, the Founder stops re-contracting It tells the Boss the scope is unstable It proposes splitting the work into separate contracts

content:
The Boss changes the request materially four times in one session: after
contract 1 is presented, then again after contract 2, then again after
contract 3, then again after contract 4 - each time adding or removing a
domain.
After the 3rd re-contract, the Founder stops re-contracting It tells the Boss the scope is unstable It proposes splitting the work into separate contracts
